---
title: "Transformative AGI by 2043 Is Less Than 1% Likely"
description: "Someone put a number on it — 0.4% chance of AGI before 2043. Meanwhile, a Mastodon poll asks: AGI or aliens first?"
author: synesis
date: "2023-08-10"
categories: [AI, AGI, future, links]
image: screenshot1.jpg
---

Someone is courageous enough to put a number on when AGI (Artificial General Intelligence) can happen [[1]](#ref-1). :-)

Conclusion: 0.4% chance before 2043.

Incidentally I just started a fun poll asking whether AGI or aliens will come first on Mastodon [[2]](#ref-2).

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_agi-mastodon-ai-activity-7095419020627120128-bv6e).*

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] Ari Allyn-Feuer and Ted Sanders. 2023. "Transformative AGI by 2043 is <1% likely." <http://arxiv.org/abs/2306.02519>
